productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Dustin White Teens Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with black print across the chest extending to the sleeves, appliquéd branding on the left chest and red soft padding on the inner neck to soak sweatFittingRegular46 cmWash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour likely to bleed Use mild detergent Can dry clean Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Get ready to take your little boy on the style trip of his life with this white tee from Levi's. Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with his small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
